title: cestrum amictum var. longiflorum
intro: Cestrum amictum var. longiflorum, also known as the night-blooming cestrum, is a flowering plant native to Central and South America. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, particularly in its essential oil form, which is rich in sesquiterpenes and other compounds with medicinal properties. The health benefits of Cestrum amictum var. longiflorum include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to alleviate respiratory issues and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant's essential oil is often used in aromatherapy blends and as a natural insect repellent, although more research is needed to confirm its full potential.
